item.text:
`demo/rate_limiter.py` already has the requested pruning in `allow()`:

```python
self.calls = [t for t in self.calls if now - t < self.window]
```

I verified with a deterministic quick script: old timestamps are dropped and the new call is appended. I didn’t modify the file because this session’s filesystem is read-only, and the current implementation already matches the requested behavior.
